name: sonner
description: Ephemeral toast notifications via Sonner. Render <Toaster /> once at app root, then call toast() anywhere.

props.name: richColors
props.description: Enable success/error/warning color variants via toast.success/error/warning

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Show a close button on each toast

examples.title: App setup + fire toast
examples.description: Render Toaster once, call toast() anywhere

ai.whenToUse: Use for transient feedback: save confirmations, error messages, background task completion. Pairs well with mutation handlers (onSuccess/onError).
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for persistent info (use Alert). Don't use for destructive confirmations (use AlertDialog). Don't use for critical errors that block user workflow.
commonMistakes: Calling toast() during server rendering (must be client-side)
Using toast for messages the user needs to re-read (they auto-dismiss)
ai.accessibilityNotes: Sonner handles aria-live='polite' on the toast region so screen readers announce new toasts. Critical messages should still use Alert/AlertDialog for persistent visibility.
